key_files.head:
[project]
name = "meta-agents"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Autonomous agents for life management"
requires-python = ">=3.12"
dependencies = [
    "anthropic>=0.40",
    "openai>=1.0",
    "beautifulsoup4>=4.12",
    "httpx>=0.27",
    "pydantic>=2.0",
    "pydantic-settings>=2.0",
    "pyyaml>=6.0",
    "typer>=0.12",
    "mcp>=1.25.0",
    "nous-ai",
]

[project.scripts]
meta = "agents.cli:main"
meta-mcp = "agents.mcp_server:main"

[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["agents"]

[tool.uv.sources]
nous-ai = { path = "../nous/nous-py", editable = true }

[tool.ruff]
target-version = "py312"
line-length = 100

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E", "F", "I", "UP"]

[tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]
"**/tests/conftest.py" = ["E501"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["agents"]
pythonpath = ["."]

[dependency-groups]
dev = [
    "pytest>=9.0.2",
]

existing_tasks.task: MVP advisory PR review ensemble
MVP advisory PR review ensemble
Ensemble orchestration layer — adopt dynamic-workflow patterns atop the harness
Testing review ensemble (thin specialization of the audit recipe)
Refactoring/best-practices ensemble (thin specialization of the audit recipe)
Nous-task emission for the refactor ensemble (review-then-implement)
Adopt forge_emit in meta testing and meta audit
Iterative coding pipeline (architect + orchestrator over Forge task trees)
Work-deployable coding harness (Bedrock + local M3)
Pipeline: extend forge_emit with per-spec gating and guardrail fields
Pipeline: extract shared sign-off gate into agents/shared/signoff.py
Pipeline: task_worker run_one() callable API

Pipeline: architect decomposition stage with boundedness checks (A2)
Pipeline: tree emission to Forge (A3)

Pipeline: wave planner (ready-set over Forge)

Pipeline: serial dispatcher over task_worker run_one

Pipeline: orchestrator wave loop
Pipeline: epic integration branch and final sign-off gate

Pipeline: workflow docs and playbook updates

Pipeline: survive replan model failure with deterministic degrade

Pipeline: cover all features of an epic in the wave loop
Worker: diagnostics and retry for no-change opencode sessions

Pipeline: escalation should also set execution mode to Manual
Pipeline: scope build status to the epic and show Done leaves

Pipeline: consolidation pass for wave-review findings before emission
Pipeline: exercise the epic-gate approve path (complete toy epic)
Worker: lint gate alongside the test gate
